title: CSS Transforms Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties for reshaping and moving elements on your web page using CSS.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional, responsive component that rotates by 45 degrees?
Which CSS property is specifically used to change the size of an element without affecting its position in the normal document flow?
Which unit is used to rotate an element around its origin (e.g., center)?
What is the primary role of 'transform: translate' compared to 'margin: 10px' for creating a hover move effect?
options: It makes the site load much faster.
It is handled by the computer's GPU, resulting in much smoother performance.
It choose the colors for the animation.
It automatically stops the animation halfway.

questions.question: What is the second property used alongside 'transform' to control WHERE an element rotates from?
